summary: Iteration 2 backend testing complete for Dosti Dil Se NGO API. Verified admin auth (JWT login, /me, protection), donations with min ₹50 + photo persistence, payment verify, Wall of Hearts (paid only, sorted desc, limit 60, photo carries through), stats with NO baseline (students_helped=total//500, projects_completed=count of completed projects), protected admin/donations & admin/contact, public + filtered projects list, full admin projects CRUD, _id exclusion, and admin seed with bcrypt $2b$ hash. 31/31 pytest cases pass (100%).
action_items: Code review (non-blocking, carry-over from iter 1): `logger` is used inside create_donation_order Razorpay except branch but is initialized after the import block; currently dormant in placeholder mode, but will NameError once real Razorpay keys are configured AND order creation throws. Move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` above route definitions.
Code review (non-blocking): @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in current FastAPI; migrate to lifespan context manager.

Code review (non-blocking): photo_base64 / image_base64 size is unbounded server-side. Storing large base64 blobs in Mongo will bloat the donations and projects collections fast. Add a size cap (e.g. <= 500KB) in Pydantic validators or strip-and-store-as-file in production.
Code review (non-blocking): admin/donations and admin/contact return up to 500 rows with no pagination params; add skip/limit before scale matters.
Code review (non-blocking): JWT_SECRET in .env is the default placeholder string — must be rotated to a real 64-char random secret before production.

Code review (non-blocking): /api/donations/wall projects fields server-side but does not enforce that photo_base64 is non-null; donors who paid without uploading a photo will still appear on the wall as anonymous tiles. Confirm desired UX with product.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth: bcrypt $2b$ hash confirmed in db.admins; seed-admin block is idempotent and re-syncs hash if ADMIN_PASSWORD env changes (good).
Auth: JWT-protected admin endpoints all return 401 (not 200/403/500) without/invalid token - verified.
Validation: amount >= 50 enforced via Pydantic Field(ge=50) -> proper 422 for 0/negative/49. status field uses regex pattern for completed|upcoming -> 422 on invalid.

MongoDB: every find() projects {_id: 0}; responses pass through Pydantic models that strip extra fields. No _id leakage in any tested endpoint (root, login, me, create-order, verify, stats, wall, admin/donations, admin/contact, contact POST, projects GET/POST/PUT).
Stats baseline: students_helped == int(total_raised // 500) and projects_completed == count of {status:'completed'} - both verified to start from 0 and match the spec (no 120 / 8 baselines).
Wall of Hearts: returns ONLY paid donations, sorted by created_at desc, limit 60, photo_base64 + name + amount + message + created_at fields all present.
Razorpay: confirmed in placeholder mode (rzp_test_placeholder); create-order returns order_mock_* ids and verify skips signature check - intentional per spec.

Latent bug carry-over: logger reference inside create_donation_order Razorpay exception branch is below the logger initialization line in import order - will NameError under real Razorpay failures. Already flagged in iter 1, still unfixed.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (rewritten for iter 2: admin auth, projects CRUD, wall, photo persistence, no-baseline stats, protected endpoints; 31 tests)
seed_data_creation: Tests insert TEST_-prefixed donations (some marked paid, with sample 1x1 PNG base64 photos), contact_messages, and projects (created+deleted within the projects CRUD test). The wall-test donation and a few stats donations remain in db.donations as `paid`. Cleanup if desired: db.donations.delete_many({'name': {'$regex': '^TEST_'}}); db.contact_messages.delete_many({'name': {'$regex': '^TEST_'}}); db.projects.delete_many({'title': {'$regex': '^TEST_'}}).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend iter 2 verified end-to-end against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Razorpay still in placeholder mode — when real keys are provided, re-test signature verification with valid AND invalid signatures, and exercise the latent logger-before-definition NameError. Frontend was intentionally not tested per request. For frontend testing next, the wall page should pull from /api/donations/wall (paid-only, photo+name), home stats from /api/donations/stats (no baseline), projects horizontal scroll on home and grid on /projects from /api/projects, and admin panel at /admin behind /admin/login using /api/admin/* endpoints with Bearer token.
rca of the issue: No active bugs in this iteration. Only one latent issue carried forward from iter 1: `logger` is referenced inside the Razorpay-exception branch of create_donation_order but never executes today (placeholder mode). Reproduction: set RAZORPAY_KEY_ID to any non-placeholder value AND make razorpay_client.order.create raise. Fix: move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` to the top-of-file imports section (line ~22) before any route definitions.
